response.justification: While the candidate has extensive full-stack and cross-platform experience, there is minimal evidence of hands-on C++ development in the last 15+ years, with only a brief mention of C++ at National Instruments in 2007–2008; the core requirements — high-performance C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, and industrial automation — are not substantiated by recent or relevant experience, and the profile is dominated by JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang work.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and open-source development experience
Strong background in distributed systems and event-driven architectures
Proven mentorship and technical communication through workshops and documentation
concerns: No recent C++ development experience beyond 2008
Lacks demonstrable exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or industrial protocols (OPC UA, Modbus, etc.)
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, not aligned with C++-centric role requirements

key_factors.factor: Absence of industrial automation or IEC 62443 exposure
